208 G1BA G1BA_SELF_TRANS (G1BA) Transfer Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: transfer - ADL self-performance "-" = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help or oversight -OR- Help/oversight provided only 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 1 = Supervision - Oversight, encouragement or cueing provided 3 or more times during last 7 days -OR- Supervision (3 or more times) plus physical
